name: Urban Food Review Carousel
aesthetic: High-contrast streetwear zine repurposed as a food review format — black backgrounds, acid yellow accents, thick uppercase sans headlines with tight tracking, duct-tape photo mounts, 'FOOD REVIEW' ticker ribbons (horizontal + vertical), tilted yellow rating badges (stars + score), grain/scratch texture overlay, barcode footer. Feels like a mixtape zine review column.

fonts.display_bold: Archivo Black / Bebas Neue (huge uppercase headlines)

review_dna: Every content slide carries a visible rating badge (stars + numeric score) — that's the hook
Body copy reads as honest, specific review notes — not ad copy. Name dishes, call out wait times, describe crust/sauce/texture.
Meta row (cuisine · neighbourhood · price tier) anchors each slide in the real world
No discount pricing, no sales language — this template is for reviews, not promos

slides.subject: Black bg; bold stacked 'FOOD / REVIEW' headline top-left; tilted yellow rating badge top-right (stars + 4.x + GOOGLE); horizontal 'FOOD REVIEW' ribbon ticker; duct-taped hero dish photo; short hook review note; barcode + handle footer.

copy.description: 1-2 sentences — the first impression review beat

slides.subject: Left-edge vertical 'FOOD REVIEW' ticker; duct-taped dish photo upper-right; bold stacked headline ('THE / DISH'); tilted rating badge; meta row (cuisine · neighbourhood · $$); long-form review paragraph focused on the signature dish; barcode + handle footer.

copy.description: 3-4 sentence focused review of the signature dish — ingredients, texture, ordering tip

slides.subject: Full duct-taped dish/interior photo (70% of frame); tilted rating badge on photo; black footer bar with bold 'THE / VIBE' stacked headline, meta row, review of the atmosphere/service, handle.

copy.description: 2-3 sentences — when to come, what the room feels like, tables/turn-time tip

slides.subject: Left column wide headline ('THE / VERDICT') + meta row + final review / recommendations; right column duct-taped photo with tilted rating badge below; 2-3 outlined yellow tags (e.g. 'DATE NIGHT', 'SMALL PLATES'); bottom yellow ribbon with 'FOOD REVIEW' ticker; barcode + handle.

copy.description: Final call — what to order, what to skip, closing line

slides.subject: Black bg; big bold 'FOUND ON' with yellow accent on 'ON'; BiteMap transparent logo on tilted yellow tape-plaque; tagline; app store badges bottom; right-edge vertical 'FOUND ON BITEMAP' ticker; barcode + handle footer.
slides.copy: Fixed: 'FOUND ON' / BiteMap logo / tagline 'real places · real reviews' / app badges

inputs_required.rating: string — Google rating (e.g. '4.8') — same across all slides unless a dish-specific score

slide2.description: 3-4 sentence focused review of the signature dish

slide3.vibeMeta: room / scene tags (e.g. 'PATIO · LATE-NIGHT · GROUPS WELCOME')

slide4.description: Closing verdict — what to order, what to skip

copy_rules: Headlines: ALL UPPERCASE, one word per line, 6 letters or fewer ideal — stacked two-line for weight
Body: specific, declarative review notes. Name dishes. Call out textures, heat, portion size, wait times.
NO sale/discount language — no '% off', 'NEW DROP', 'LIMITED'. This is a review template, not a promo template.
Rating badge is always present on every content slide (1-4). Use the honest Google rating.
Meta rows use `·` separators and are ALL CAPS with yellow text — keep them to 2-4 items max
Restaurant name lives in @handle / footer. Never in the big stacked headline.
Tone: dry, specific, zine-style. No emojis. No hype adjectives ('amazing', 'must-try').
asset_rules: Photos should feel real and energetic — hands-on food, hero dish close-ups, warm interior shots
Moody / desaturated photos complement the black + yellow palette; blown-out studio food fights it
Minimum 1080px wide; real photos only (no AI)
Always use `bitemap_logo_transparent.png` — never a rasterized logo with baked-in background
use_when: Honest review-format content for gritty, casual, late-night, or streetwear-adjacent restaurants
Dish-specific reviews where the verdict + rating is the hook
Hidden-gem posts where the format's zine energy signals 'this is a real review, not an ad'
Cuisines with visual muscle — smash burgers, birria, tacos, wings, ramen, late-night slices
